name: review
description: Fan out three reviewers over the working diff, each from a different angle, in parallel.

tasks.label: bugs
tasks.prompt: Run `git diff` and review ONLY for correctness bugs (logic, off-by-one, nil, wrong conditions). List each as file:line — issue, or say 'none'.

tasks.label: security
tasks.prompt: Run `git diff` and review ONLY for security issues (injection, leaked secrets, unsafe shell, path traversal). List each as file:line — issue, or say 'none'.

tasks.label: simplify
tasks.prompt: Run `git diff` and review ONLY for simplifications and reuse opportunities (duplicated logic, an existing helper that fits). List each as file:line — issue, or say 'none'.
